name: data-handling
description: Teaches agents how to classify, store, transmit, redact, retain, and share organizational data according to local policy. Covers classification tiers, DLP-awareness, external-sharing rules, and redaction. Use when an agent reads, summarizes, moves, exports, or shares any document or data. Customize the placeholders before deploying.
version_note: Template plugin intended to be customized per-organization before rollout.
